ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number within the album */,
  "album_id" TEXT /* ID of the album to which the track belongs */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy score of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key signature of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness level of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (major/minor) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness score of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in BPM */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the track is explicit */,
  "key_name" TEXT /* Name of the key associated with the track */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the mode associated with the track */,
  "key_mode" TEXT /* Descriptive name of the key mode */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code for the track */,
  "isrc_country" TEXT /* Country of the ISRC */,
  "composer" TEXT /* Composer of the track */,
  "lyricist" TEXT /* Lyricist of the track */,
  "copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information for the track */,
  "album_type" TEXT /* Type of the album (e.g., single, album, EP) */,
  "record_label" TEXT /* Record label of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label of the album */,
  "album_type" TEXT /* Type of the album (e.g., single, album, EP) */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL of the album cover art */,
  "copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information for the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_artists" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the artist in the track (e.g., main, featured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the playlist */,
  "privacy" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the playlist (e.g., public, private) */,
  "collaborative" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the playlist is collaborative */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the playlist */,
  "total_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the playlist in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "added_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who added the track to the playlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the track was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track being interacted with */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., play, like, share) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity (e.g., playlist name for a 'create playlist' activity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "followed_artists" TEXT /* IDs of artists the user follows */,
  "followed_users" TEXT /* IDs of other users the user follows */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., playlist update, new track) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play history record */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who played the track */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track that was played */,
  "play_time" TEXT /* Time when the track was played */,
  "play_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the play in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_history_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the admin user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the admin account was created */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin user (e.g., content curator, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the admin user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)
